description: Phishing templates targeting students and educational institution staff

templates.name: Financial Aid Urgent Notice
suggested_subject_lines: URGENT: Your financial aid requires immediate action
Financial Aid Office: Your award is at risk — respond now
Action Required: FAFSA verification needed before deadline
templates.notes: Extremely effective for student populations. Financial aid anxiety is a powerful motivator.

templates.name: Student Portal Account Lockout
suggested_subject_lines: Your student account has been temporarily suspended
Action Required: Verify your student portal account
Account hold detected — resolve before registration opens
